subcodes.first_line: How many a near one is remote and unrecognized, and how many a distant one is nigh, drawing close through hearts! This indeed is the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم من قریب بعید و لایعرف و کم من بعید هو القریب یقربوا بالقلوب هذا هو المحبوب
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @outward and inward meanings, @alchemy; the elixir, @suffering and imprisonment, @Greatest Name
